name: Gold & Diamond Buyers of San Diego - Knight Jewelry, Watch, Coin & Bullion
description_short: Chula Vista precious metals buyer paying cash on the spot for gold, silver, diamonds, luxury watches, coins, bullion, antiques, and art based on live market prices.
description_long:
Gold & Diamond Buyers of San Diego is a precious metals and collectibles dealer that purchases gold, diamonds, luxury watches, silver, coins, jewelry, antiques, and art from individual sellers. The company operates as a buy-only business focused on acquiring valuable items at fair market prices, with no lending or pawn loan services.

The company emphasizes professional evaluation and transparent pricing. According to their website, they employ expert evaluators who assess items and offer competitive market-rate quotes. They describe their process as "fast, transparent, and customer-focused," providing immediate cash payment upon sale completion.

Customers can contact the company by phone at (619) 777–8238 or email info@goldanddiamondbuyerssandiego.com for item evaluation and sale inquiries. The company serves individual sellers in the San Diego area.

pricing.guarantee_details: No guarantee structure applicable — this is a cash-buying business. Transactions are final cash payments to the seller.

pros: 5.0/5 Google rating across 1,927 reviews — exceptionally strong reputation for a cash-buying operation
BBB A+ rated and accredited, with verifiable profile at bbb.org
Items tested and weighed in front of the customer using certified scales and XRF (X-ray) technology
Pricing tied directly to live spot market prices for gold and silver — no arbitrary valuation
Will price-match written quotes from other reputable dealers
Walk-in, no-appointment-needed model with same-day cash payment
Licensed precious metals dealer in California with roughly 12 years of operating history
cons: Buy-only business — does not offer pawn loans, so sellers cannot reclaim items later
No retail sales of jewelry or bullion found — not a source for purchasing precious metals
Hours differ between the two co-located entities (Gold & Diamond Buyers vs. Knight Jewelry & Coin), requiring confirmation before visiting
No mobile app or customer portal; quote requests handled via web form only
Primarily serves Southern California in person — not an option for sellers outside the region
best_for: Individuals looking to sell inherited or unwanted gold jewelry, including broken or scrap pieces, for immediate cash
Coin collectors or estates liquidating coin collections, bullion, or numismatic items
Owners of luxury watches (Rolex and similar) seeking a transparent, same-day cash offer
Sellers who want in-person, verifiable testing and pricing rather than mail-in services
diagnosis: Gold & Diamond Buyers of San Diego is best suited for San Diego-area residents who want to sell precious metals, jewelry, coins, or luxury watches for cash on the spot, with full transparency during the evaluation process. Their live market pricing and in-view XRF testing address the most common trust concerns in this industry, and their review volume backs it up. The main caveat is that this is strictly a buying business — anyone seeking a collateral-backed loan or looking to purchase items should look elsewhere.
services: Gold jewelry buying (including broken and scrap gold)
Luxury watch buying (Rolex and other brands)
